mapper.insert: insert into short_link (id, short_code, long_url,create_time,expire_time,update_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shortCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{longUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{expireTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) on duplicate key update status = 7
mapper.update: update short_link set short_code = #{shortCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, long_url = #{longUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, expire_time = #{expireTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select id, short_code, long_url, create_time, expire_time, status,click_count, update_time from short_link
